name: @tank/shadcn-mastery
description: Build, customize, and scale design systems with shadcn/ui. Covers CLI and configuration, CSS variable theming and dark mode, component customization with cva variants, data tables with TanStack Table, forms with react-hook-form and zod, charts, the registry system, Radix accessibility primitives, component composition patterns, monorepo setup, and Tailwind CSS v4 integration.
